title: Elegant Embellishments CIT pack
description: Elegant Embellishments is a Custom-Model Resource Pack (also known as a CIT pack) that changes the way regular vanilla items appear in Item frames, allowing you to decorate your buildings.
body:
Elegant Embellishments is a Custom-Model Resource Pack (also known as a CIT pack) that changes the way regular vanilla items appear in Item frames, allowing you to decorate your buildings. To use, you must install the Optifine mod for Forge or CITResewn or Optifine+Optifabric for Fabric or Quilt. 

List of models at the moment:
item: iron_block
window_frame_corner
window_frame_line
window_frame_o
window_frame_u
item: stone_bricks
facing_brick_1x
facing_brick_2c
facing_brick_2x
facing_brick_3l
facing_brick_3r
facing_brick_3x
facing_brick_corner

※ Do not redistribute the pack as your own, or claim it as your own creation.
※ Do not modify the pack without permission from the author.
※ Do not upload the packs to any websites.
